title: thelypteris marojejyensis
intro: Thelypteris marojejyensis, also known as Marojejy fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the island of Madagascar and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris marojejyensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves are also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
